violations.text: Observed adulterated lemons in walk-in cooler. PIC voluntarily disposed of adulterated lemons at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with biofilm on ice stopper. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC removed ice stopper to wash, rinse, and sanitize during the time of this inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2025

Rice and queso cheese were observed held at 88-118 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. -Staff increased the hot holding temperature of the unit during this inspection. -Staff reheated the TCS foods to 165 degrees F. or above during this inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/26/2024

The bottom unit of the salad station was not in good repair. Ice buildup observed in the unit. Ice shall be broken down and removed from unit. Service must be contacted. -The metal frame of the interior panel of the bottom salad unit was not in good repair. Frame was coming off of the door panel. -Water observed leaking from the ceiling in the walk-in cooler. -The light bulb in the walk-in cooler observed out. Bulb shall be replaced. -All equipment must be maintained in good repair. Service must be contacted. New Violation. Correct By: 01/10/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the following items have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: 1. Hood/vents in the kitchen. 2. Vent of the FWE hot holding unit. 3. Underneath the sinks in the bar area. The non-food contact surfaces shall be cleaned as often as necessary to prevent buildup of residue. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/10/2025

The ceiling tile above the cook line and some floor tiles in the back of the kitchen observed in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Ceiling tile and floor tiles shall be repaired or replaced. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/17/2025

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. Dish machine wasd taken out of service at time of inspection. Per PIC, all equipment will be sanitized using the three bay sink until servivce is provided. New Violation. Correct By: 03/28/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of biofilm. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC voluntarily disposed of ice and took ice machine out of service at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/28/2024

The following non-food contact surfaces were observed with an accumulation of debris: 1) The hood vents above the cooklines had grease and other debris 2) The storage racks in the alcohol walk-in cooler had biofilm New Violation. Correct By: 04/04/2024
The plumbing under the dish machine was in poor repair (active leak observed). New Violation. Correct By: 04/11/2024

The ceiling above the main prep line has an accumulation of soil residue and/or dust. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/04/2024
